pageContext.name: Portrait of Pirates Roronoa Zoro Demon Spirit Kyuutou-ryuu “Asura”
pageContext.description: The 'MAXIMUM' high-end series of the P.O.P. brings Roronoa Zoro back once again with an all-new anime figure!  The proud swordsman of the Straw Hat Pirates has been sculpted making use of his Demon Aura Nine-Sword Style Asura technique, and both the sculpt and the paintwork have been improved over the previous 'Three Thousand Worlds' version.  This version also features Zoro in his black outfit from Onigashima with his swords spinning out in all sorts of directions just like an 'Asura', the namesake for the technique!  The figure has the MAXIMUM amount of detail that fans will be proud to add to their One Piece collection!
